name: steras
description: STERAS — Smart Tourism Event Risk & Approval System (Malaysia)

scripts.build: npm --workspace frontend run build && npm --workspace functions run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace frontend run typecheck && npm --workspace functions run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace frontend run test && npm --workspace functions run test
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,storage --project steras-test "npm --workspace functions run test:rules"
scripts.test:coverage: npm --workspace frontend run test:coverage && npm --workspace functions run test:coverage
scripts.deploy:functions: npm --workspace functions run build && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm --workspace frontend run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.lint: npm --workspace frontend run lint && npm --workspace functions run lint
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
